creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
D=E1vid Fazeka?, 28.01.09, 11:16h CET:

> Stefan,
> using ldconfig 32 on amd64 doesn't solve all the problems... (see also=20
> here http://www.nabble.com/hpacucli-on-fbsd7--td16382298.html)
>=20
> Guys from HP, you should release 64bit binary of hpacucli, cause there's=
=20
> a lot of people using your products on BSD, i think... >:o

OK - given that there have been multiple reports of the software not
working on amd64, I'll mark it as broken on that architecture until a fix
is provided.

Regards,
Stefan
